programme.title: ATP Final: Buenos Aires

programme.title: ATP Final: Miami
programme.desc: Chasing a record seventh men's Miami crown, Novak Djokovic - now the oldest ATP Masters 1000 finalist - takes on Jakub Mensik, aiming to win his first tour-level trophy. (30.03)

programme.title: WTA Final: Rome
programme.desc: A women's singles champion is crowned at the Italian Open, as home favourite and world number five Jasmine Paolini faces the American Coco Gauff. (17.05)

programme.title: ATP Final: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Chasing a sixth ATP 1000 title and a first in Monte-Carlo, 21-year-old Spaniard Carlos Alcaraz competes in a blockbuster clash with first-time Masters finalist Lorenzo Musetti. (13.04)

programme.title: WTA Final: Montreal
programme.desc: Rising Canadian star Victoria Mboko's miracle Montreal run continues as the 18-year-old meets four-time Grand Slam champion Naomi Osaka in her first tour-level final. (07.08)

programme.title: ATP Final: Rotterdam
programme.desc: Top seed Alex de Minaur competes in his third consecutive Rotterdam final as former champion Felix Auger-Aliassime bids to deny the Australian a long-awaited trophy at the ATP 500. (15.02)

programme.title: WTA Final: Dubai
programme.desc: Meeting for the first time in a final, 31-year-olds Jessica Pegula and Elina Svitolina vie for the Dubai crown. Svitolina bids to end an eight-year wait for her third title here. (21.02)

programme.title: ATP Final: Doha
programme.desc: Standing between Carlos Alcaraz, in the midst of an 11-game winning run, and a maiden Qatar Open title is the resurgent Arthur Fils - playing in his first final since 2024. (21.02)

programme.title: Tennis Highlights
programme.desc: Ignacio Buse enters the biggest semi-final of his career having already overcome both Joao Fonseca and Matteo Berrettini in Rio, as the 21-year-old Peruvian faces Alejandro Tabilo. (21.02)

programme.title: Tennis Highlights

programme.title: The Australian Wars
programme.desc: 2/3. How the growing number of European arrivals in Tasmania saw the death count grow, too. Contains some violence and some upsetting scenes.

programme.title: The Secret World of Haute Couture
programme.desc: Margy Kinmonth meets millionaire customers and world-famous designers as she explores the anachronistic but little-explained pocket of the fashion industry known as haute couture.

programme.title: Eurovision Classical Concerts: Lisbon
programme.desc: Celebrating great music-making across Europe, a special concert from the Gulbenkian Foundation in Lisbon, also featuring the works of Smetana and Debussy. Nicholas Collon presents.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Face the Music

programme.title: The Horizon Guide to AI
programme.desc: Documentary looking at the perception of AI from 1964 to the present day. Can we be optimistic about all that AI can deliver - or fearful of its ability to control our lives?

programme.desc: The Night Shift: Holt looks for ways to improve the team's morale, while Santiago is filled with curiosity when Diaz starts to take long breaks from her desk.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Treehouse of Horror XI: Homer receives a very scary horoscope, and Bart and Lisa are banished to the forest, where they find a house made of gingerbread...

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A Tale of Two Springfields: When class rivalries split Springfield in two, Homer becomes mayor of 'New Springfield'.

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Gemma's determined to uncover the truth behind her dad's behaviour. Rex is forced to hide as he continues to explore his identity. And a newly released resident returns to seek revenge...

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Much Apu About Something: Apu loses his job when his shop is rebranded as a health food market aimed at a hip young crowd. Bart's latest prank has terrible consequences.

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off...
programme.desc: ...for Stand Up To Cancer: Jeremy Paxman, Joe Wilkinson, Sally Lindsay and Georgia Toffolo make characterful biscuits and a cake in the shape of their favourite hobby.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: On the box this time: Britain's Got Talent, Bridgerton, Romeo and Duet, The 1% Club, Inside the Force: 24/7, Piers Morgan Uncensored and Formula 1: Drive to Survive.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: On the box this time: Britain's Got Talent, One Night Stand, Gordon Ramsay's Future Food Stars, Freeze the Fear with Wim Hof and Great British History Hunters.

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: A Devilish Twist: A three-time Miss Wales arrives, turning some of the boys' heads. And Rylan, dressed as an evil angel, delivers a hellish surprise...

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Skyla's cleaning business keeps her too busy to find a man. Is her sparkly someone in the pods? Bisexual trans man Zeus is just dipping his toe into dating... can he find the one?

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: On the box this time: Britain's Got Talent, Bridgerton, Romeo and Duet, The 1% Club, Inside the Force: 24/7, Piers Morgan Uncensored and Formula 1: Drive to Survive.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: On the box this time: Britain's Got Talent, One Night Stand, Gordon Ramsay's Future Food Stars, Freeze the Fear with Wim Hof and Great British History Hunters.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Treehouse of Horror XI: Homer receives a very scary horoscope, and Bart and Lisa are banished to the forest, where they find a house made of gingerbread...

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Lainey Loves Lionel: Barry takes inspiration from Lionel Richie and sets about creating a sculpture of Lainey as the ultimate Valentine's Day gift.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Weird Al: Adam plans to reignite his fading relationship with Dana by taking her to a concert. Barry and Erica worry that Murray may be feeling depressed.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: En Garde: The family supports Manny's new interest - fencing. It turns out he's pretty good at it, but Jay's proud enthusiasm triggers an old childhood wound for Mitchell.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: The One at a Music Festival: Jake wants the ultimate wedding knees-up, but bride-to-be Rosie dreams of a more intimate affair. Will this festival wedding prove to be a headliner?

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
programme.desc: More clips from Rude Tube's naughty little sister, including a zombie prank, cats singing the Star Wars theme, a hilarious pee prank and an escaped honey badger.

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: With the McQueen house in lockdown, original family members return, as a series of 'what if' scenarios play out during a high-stakes situation. And John Paul makes a life-changing decision.

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Gemma's determined to uncover the truth behind her dad's behaviour. Rex is forced to hide as he continues to explore his identity. And a newly released resident returns to seek revenge...

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
programme.desc: A short, cheeky clip featuring animals and food, from the always hilarious Tube that is Rude.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Seascape: Gordon Ramsay visits the Seascape restaurant in the seaside village of Islip, on Long Island in New York, where owner Peter has nearly a million dollars of debt.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The Secret Garden: Gordon Ramsay visits a romantic French restaurant in California, where temperamental chef Michel Bardavid's complicated cuisine is keeping the customers away.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: We Didn't Start the Fire: Erica tells Beverly that she's going to spend the first night of Hanukkah with Geoff and his family. Pops gives Barry advice on how to be cool.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The Goldberg Girls: Beverly seeks her children's advice on assembling a circle of friends for her later years. Geoff's romantic gestures begin to annoy Erica.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Good Grief: It's another epic Halloween full of costumes, tricks and treats for the Dunphy-Pritchett-Tucker clan as they deal with huge, unexpected news.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: On the Same Paige: Phil's real estate class will be cancelled if any more students drop it. So he turns on his charm to try to convince one student, Paige, to stay.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Lela's: In California, Gordon Ramsay visits Lela's, a fine dining restaurant run by inexperienced owner Lela and young chef Ricky. Can Gordon save them from complete disaster?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Sebastian's: Gordon Ramsay visits Sebastian's, a pizzeria in Los Angeles. The customers are scarce and the debt is mounting. Can Gordon turn the restaurant's fortunes around?

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Cheddar: Santiago and Peralta house-sit for Captain Holt when he visits Kevin in Paris and mayhem ensues when Holt's beloved dog goes missing on their watch.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Terry Kitties: Jeffords enlists Peralta's help to solve a case from his past. Santiago invites herself to a competitive training exercise with Holt and Diaz.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer vs the Eighteenth Amendment: When alcohol is banned in Springfield, Moe's Tavern becomes a speakeasy and Homer re-invents himself as the Beer Baron.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grade School Confidential: Principal Skinner and Mrs Krabappel embark on a torrid affair but have to bribe Bart to keep the whole thing a secret.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The Opportunity of a Lifetime: Barry gets the chance to throw the first pitch at a Phillies baseball game. Erica makes an important decision about her future.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Spaceballs: Adam tries to start a Mel Brooks club after watching the movie Spaceballs. Erica plans to tell Beverly and Pops about a big decision she's made.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Red Alert: Lily has reached a womanly milestone that Cam and Mitch are not prepared for at all. So they call in reinforcements...

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Wild: Mitch, Cam and Phil crash Jay's annual hiking trip to find an elusive bald eagle. And Gloria, Alex, Claire and Haley get together to plan a baby shower.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Halloween IV: It's Halloween, so the squad follow precinct tradition and compete for the title of Ultimate Detective Slash Genius.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Monster in the Closet: When Pimento and Diaz decide to tie the knot, the squad try to prepare the perfect wedding under Santiago's careful direction.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Insane Clown Poppy: Homer and Bart take Lisa to a book fair, where Krusty meets his long-lost daughter (guest star Drew Barrymore). But it doesn't go well...

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa the Tree Hugger: A dramatic rooftop protest at Krusty Burger inspires Lisa to become an eco-radical - especially when she sees how cute one of the protestors is...

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: On the day of the joint engagement party, secrets threaten to spill, while Rex struggles with his truth. Gemma faces a painful revelation, and Sienna makes a shocking discovery.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Love Is in the N2-O2-Ar-CO2-Ne-He-CH4: Professor Frink uses science to turn into a ladies' man. And medication makes Grampa and the Retirement Castle residents hallucinate.

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off...
programme.desc: ...for Stand Up To Cancer: Louis Theroux, Jenny Eclair, Russell Howard and Ovie Soko tackle a giant biscuit, a classic bake and a choux sculpture depicting their perfect day.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: This time on the Box: Heartstopper, Made in Chelsea, The Circle, Bee Czar, Ramsay's Future Food Stars, and BBC News covering Keir Starmer's lockdown 'Beergate' controversy.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Dog groomer Nico is after the perfect partner to get her all hot under the collar, while care worker Patrice wants a divine angel who can also be a horny devil in the bedroom.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: The leading news stories of the moment.

programme.title: Django Unchained
programme.desc: (2012) Quentin Tarantino's darkly comic, award-laden western with Jamie Foxx, Christopher Waltz, Leonardo DiCaprio and Samuel L Jackson. A freed slave searches for his wife... and revenge.

programme.title: Late Night with the Devil
programme.desc: (2023) Unsettling found-footage horror with David Dastmalchian. A has-been host tries to save his 70s talk show using a demonically possessed 13-year-old girl. Really, what could go wrong?

programme.title: River
programme.desc: (2023) Farcical time-loop comedy about the staff and guests at a remote mountain hotel condemned to repeat the same two minutes over, and over, and over, and over again. In Japanese/subs.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and the Secret...
programme.desc: ...Weapon: (1942) WWII spy adventure starring Basil Rathbone and Nigel Bruce. Sherlock Holmes and Doctor Watson attempt to prevent the Nazis from acquiring a revolutionary invention.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: (1960) Fantasy adventure. Claude Rains plays a scientist who, convinced that dinosaurs still roam the earth, sets off into the Amazon to find them. Based on Sir Arthur Conan Doyle's novel.

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: (1997) Action thriller starring Pierce Brosnan and Linda Hamilton. The inhabitants of a volcano-side resort unwisely ignore a scientist's warning about its imminent eruption.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: (2017) Fantasy adventure sequel with Dwayne Johnson, Karen Gillan, Kevin Hart and Jack Black. Four teenagers are sucked into the Jumanji video game to complete a dangerous quest.

programme.title: Independence Day: Resurgence
programme.desc: (2016) Sci-fi blockbuster sequel starring Jeff Goldblum and Liam Hemsworth. Twenty years after Earth repelled a devastating alien invasion, the extraterrestrials return to finish the job.

programme.title: M3GAN
programme.desc: (2022) Creepy-doll horror with Allison Williams. A robotics engineer simultaneously invents an AI dolly and takes on the care of her orphaned niece. But can a cyborg really raise a kid?

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: (2013) All-American action thriller starring Channing Tatum and Jamie Foxx. A Capitol police officer steps up to protect the President when the White House is compromised.

programme.title: The King
programme.desc: (2005) Gael Garcia Bernal plays an ex-navy rating who infiltrates pastor William Hurt's family to exact revenge for a wrong suffered by his mother. Sex/violence/strong language from start.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: LumoTV: Getting Personal with...
programme.desc: ...Abigail Gorman: Abigail is a well-known activist and campaigner. We follow her through an ADHD diagnosis and ask her what the future might hold.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Fixed Bayonets!
programme.desc: (1951) Korean War drama about the stress of battle. Officers drop one by one as a US platoon fights a rearguard action, leaving one unwilling man (Richard Basehart) to take their place.

programme.title: Anzio
programme.desc: (1968) Epic Second World War drama starring Robert Mitchum. A reporter gets trapped behind enemy lines during the costly 1944 Allied invasion of Italy. With Peter Falk and Robert Ryan.

programme.title: Decision at Sundown
programme.desc: (1957) Western starring Randolph Scott and John Carroll. A man seeking revenge for his wife's death tracks his rival down in the sleepy town of Sundown...

programme.title: The Rare Breed
programme.desc: (1966) Western with Maureen O'Hara and James Stewart. With the help of a drifter, a widow strives to fulfil her husband's last wish to introduce rare cattle to the perilous American west.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: (2019) Adventure comedy sequel with Dwayne Johnson, Jack Black, Kevin Hart and Karen Gillan. The old school pals enter the Jumanji video game again to save their friend.

programme.title: Flamin' Hot
programme.desc: (2023) Eva Longoria directs the real-life story of Richard Montañez - the Latino janitor who invented Flamin' Hot Cheetos, aka the 'world's most popular snack'. Starring Jesse Garcia.

programme.title: Call Jane
programme.desc: (2022) Fact-based drama with Elizabeth Banks and Sigourney Weaver. An underground abortion network helps a woman with a life-threatening pregnancy in pre-Roe-v-Wade America.

programme.title: I'm Your Man
programme.desc: (2021) Poignant sci-fi romantic comedy with Maren Eggert and Dan Stevens. In near-future Berlin, a lonely archaeologist helps to trial a new line in robot companions. In German/subs.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Crash Dive
programme.desc: (1943) Second World War drama starring Tyrone Power and Anne Baxter. An ambitious naval officer falls in love with a school teacher before leaving on a dangerous submarine mission.

programme.title: Twelve O'Clock High
programme.desc: (1949) World War II drama starring Gregory Peck as a US general who must treat a demoralised bomber squadron severely to restore discipline. With Oscar-winning support from Dean Jagger.

programme.title: Django Unchained Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Quentin Tarantino and stars Samuel L Jackson, Christoph Waltz, Jamie Foxx and Kerry Washington talk about making the western adventure set against a backdrop of slavery.

programme.title: First Knight
programme.desc: (1995) Romantic drama based on Arthurian legend, starring Richard Gere, Sean Connery and Julia Ormond. Can nomadic swordsman Lancelot contain his love for King Arthur's fiancée?

programme.title: Men in Black: International...
programme.desc: ...Interview Special: Stars Chris Hemsworth and Tessa Thompson, director F Gary Gray and producers Walter Parkes and Laurie Macdonald talk about bringing the series back for a fourth part.

programme.title: Men in Black: International
programme.desc: (2019) Fourth instalment of the sci-fi comedy franchise with Chris Hemsworth, Tessa Thompson and Liam Neeson. An alien-obsessed rookie joins London's Men in Black team.

programme.title: Blackberry
programme.desc: (2023) Matt Johnson, Glenn Howerton and Jay Baruchel star in the frenetic, flabbergasting and mostly true story of the precipitous rise and fall of the once ubiquitous device.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum
programme.desc: (2019) Keanu Reeves returns for the third time as the supposedly retired hitman. Someone's put a contract on John Wick's head and only a mystic in Morocco can lift it.

programme.title: River
